mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.user_img, c.cat_name FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_member m on b.writer = m.userid LEFT JOIN tbl_category c ON b.cat_id = c.cat_id WHERE b.bno > 0 ORDER BY b.bno DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_board (bno, title, content, writer, cat_id) VALUES (seq_board.nextval, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer},#{cat_id})
mapper.select: select b.*, m.user_img FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_member m on b.writer = m.userid WHERE b.bno = #{bno}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_board SET viewcnt = viewcnt + 1 WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_like WHERE bno = #{bno} AND userid = #{userid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_like (lno, bno, userid) VALUES (seq_like.nextval, #{bno}, #{userid})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_like WHERE bno = #{bno} AND userid = #{userid}
mapper.update: update tbl_board set dislikecnt = dislikecnt + #{amount} where bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_board_like WHERE bno = #{bno} AND userid = #{userid} AND type = #{type}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_board_like (lno, bno, userid, type) VALUES (seq_board_like.nextval, #{bno}, #{userid}, #{type})
mapper.update: update tbl_board set replycnt = replycnt + #{amount} where bno = #{bno}
mapper.insert:
select seq_board.nextval from dual
insert into tbl_board (bno, title, content, writer, cat_id) values (#{bno}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, #{cat_id})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.*, c.cat_name FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_category c ON b.cat_id = c.cat_id WHERE b.cat_id = 11 ORDER BY b.bno DESC ) WHERE rownum <= 3

SELECT bno, title, content, writer, regdate, updatedate, cat_name, cat_slug FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(tbl_board pk_board) */ rownum rn, b.bno, b.title, b.content, b.writer, b.regdate, b.updatedate, c.cat_name, c.cat_slug FROM tbl_board b JOIN tbl_category c ON b.cat_id = c.cat_id WHERE c.cat_slug = #{category} AND rownum <= #{cri.pageNum} * #{cri.amount} ) WHERE rn > (#{cri.pageNum} - 1) * #{cri.amount}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.BNO, b.TITLE, b.REGDATE, b.REPLYCNT, c.CAT_NAME FROM TBL_BOARD b LEFT JOIN TBL_CATEGORY c ON b.CAT_ID = c.CAT_ID WHERE b.CAT_ID = #{cat_id} ORDER BY b.REGDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.*, c.CAT_NAME, (b.LIKECNT + b.REPLYCNT) as score FROM TBL_BOARD b LEFT JOIN TBL_CATEGORY c ON b.CAT_ID = c.CAT_ID WHERE
b.REGDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
b.REGDATE >= SYSDATE - 7
b.REGDATE >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1)
b.CAT_ID = 1
b.REGDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
ORDER BY score DESC, b.VIEWCNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.*, c.cat_name, (b.likecnt + b.replycnt) as hot_score FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_category c ON b.cat_id = c.cat_id WHERE
b.regdate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) b.regdate >= SYSDATE - 7 b.regdate >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1) b.regdate >= SYSDATE - 365
ORDER BY hot_score DESC, b.viewcnt DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
